evals.prompt: Write a markdown guide about setting up a PostgreSQL database with Docker for local development. Include a Mermaid diagram showing the container architecture.
evals.expected_output: A well-structured .md file with YAML frontmatter (title, description, author, created, updated, version, status, tags, category), H1 matching title, a Mermaid diagram, fenced code blocks with language identifiers, and proper formatting.

evals.prompt: Create an API specification document for a REST endpoint that handles user authentication. It should cover the request/response formats, error codes, and flow.
evals.expected_output: A markdown file with complete YAML frontmatter, proper heading hierarchy, tables for request/response fields, a sequence diagram in Mermaid, and code blocks with language tags.

evals.prompt: Write an Architecture Decision Record (ADR) about choosing Redis over Memcached for session caching. Include pros/cons and a decision matrix.
evals.expected_output: An ADR-style markdown document with YAML frontmatter including category: adr, structured sections (context, decision, consequences), a comparison table, and proper formatting.
